passes.description: Ensures the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2.1 AA limits across all four themes (Dark, Light, Midnight, Neon)
Ensures each HTML document has a non-empty title element
Ensures every HTML document has a lang attribute (pt-BR set)
Ensures every image has alt text or a decorative aria-hidden attribute
Ensures all ARIA elements have correct roles and semantic layout wrap
Ensures keyboard navigation users can clearly identify the focused element via focus-visible
